text: I couldn't get an appointment for three weeks, and even then the clinic was far from a bus line.
The doctor explained everything clearly and I felt listened to for the first time.
My copay went up again this year, so I've been skipping the follow-up visits.
Front desk staff were dismissive, and I waited over an hour past my scheduled time.
Telehealth made it much easier, but I still worry whether they have my full history.
